text: Apple announced new M5 chips today, claiming a 40% performance gain over the previous generation. The chips will ship in MacBook Pros starting next month.
The Senate passed a sweeping energy bill last night that expands tax credits for renewable projects and accelerates permitting for transmission lines.
Congress reached a bipartisan deal on immigration reform after months of negotiation. The bill includes a path to citizenship for DACA recipients and increased border funding.
FDA approved a new gene therapy for sickle cell disease, marking the second such treatment cleared this year. Cost remains a barrier for widespread adoption.
Quarterly earnings from major retailers showed mixed results, with discount chains outperforming department stores as consumers continue to trade down.
